scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @bob/server" "npm run dev -w @bob/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bob/server && npm run build -w @bob/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @bob/server && npm run typecheck -w @bob/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @bob/server && npm run lint -w @bob/web
